description: THE FINAL POLISH THESIS. Install at ~/.claude/skills/tungsten-forge/EDGE_DOCTRINE.md as a permanent companion to SKILL.md. Reframes what edge IS across nine empirically-confirmed lenses (timing, exit, avoidance, asymmetry, survival, opportunity-cost, emergence, adaptation-speed, and flow/forced-counterparty). Each lens is bound by the full existing discipline. This does not loosen any guard -- it redefines the target every guard protects. Capstone to tungsten-forge v2.0.
